title: Roof window frame with installation set and flashing assembly
abstract: The invention solves the issue of a roof window frame position that is within a plane parallel to the roof structure wherein the frame sills require protection against deformation, bending and twisting under the load of the window casement. The roof window frame is characterized by the fact that it is equipped with tilting fasteners (2) and stabilizing angle bars (3), whereas the peripheral groove (21) of the frame (1) has embedded brackets (19), and the bottom guard (8) is bonded with shaped corners (13) with adjustment brackets (18), while the shaped corners (13) have through holes (14) located in accordance to the openings in the retaining wall (11) with embedded double-element drainage units (16), whereas the top part of the set of side guards (10) ends with a frame clamp (22) with a top guard (9) having a retaining wall (23). Moreover, the frame clamp (22) is covered by an over-frame side guard (26) and an over-frame top guard (27), whereas the frame (1) has sockets (24) for snap brackets (25) from the inside.
claims: Claims Claims 1. Roof window frame with an installation set and a flashing set, containing elements for fixing to the roof slope and a sealing flange connection with the roofing, fabricated using elements made of thin sheet metal through standard forming from flat profiles of the top, bottom and side elements, characterized in that the frame (1) is equipped with tilting fasteners (2) permanently fixed in the bottom sill (4) and top sill (5), and equipped with stabilizing angle bars (3), whereas the peripheral groove (21) of the frame (1) has tongues (20) with embedded brackets (19) positioning a set of side guards (10), while the bottom guard (8) is bonded with shaped corners (13) with adjustment brackets (18) on the horizontal walls (17), whereas the shaped corners (13) have through holes (14) located in accordance to the openings in the retaining wall (11) with embedded double-element drainage units (16) simultaneously fastening the bottom guard (8) to the bottom sill (4) of the frame (1), while the top part of the set of side guards (10) ends with a frame clamp (22) with a top guard (9) having a retaining wall (23). Moreover, the frame clamp (22) is covered by an over-frame side guard (26) and an over-frame top guard (27), whereas the frame (1) has sockets (24) for snap brackets (25) from the inside. 2. The frame according to claim 1 is characterized in that it has two permanently fixed tilting fasteners (2) in the bottom sill (4), and one permanently fixed tilting fastener (2) in the top sill (5). 3. The frame according to claim 1 is characterized in that the tilting fasteners (2) are fixed to the frame (2) using butt hinges (6), with an axis of rotation in the form of a curve. 4. The frame according to claim 1 is characterized in that fastening stiffeners (19) are preferably in the form of angle bars, 5. The frame according to claim 1 is characterized in that adjusting brackets (18) position the side guards (10) relative to the bottom part of the frame (1). 6. The frame according to claims 1 and 8 is characterized in that profiled frame clamp (22) has a section with a contour similar to the letter "Z". 7. The frame according to claims 1 is characterized in that the snap brackets (25) are situated on the outer surface of the stile (7) and the top sill (5). 8. The frame according to claims 1 or 7 is characterized in that the snap bracket (25) has a bearing plate (28) with a snap arm (30) surrounded by a compensating guide (31).
